Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 21 7 4}If the description is accurate, today's screening will have no lack of ninjas.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_900_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Heh heh heh! Once I activate this weapon, the entire country will— Wha!? My men! Wh-Where did they go!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_901_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Your men are taking a little nap...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_903_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I am a shadow. I approach in silence... and then, I strike.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We learned about the history of ninjas and[n]their mind-bending fighting techniques...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I have updated my records with valuable information.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Ninja is the ultimate status that a man can achieve.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}In combat, the power of their body is equivalent to that of highly advanced special weapons.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}They were trained war machines, with unparalleled fighting skill.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 21 7 4}Considering their overwhelming might, I am curious as to why they no longer exist in today's world...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I learned that the name Hattori Hanzo is actually a title instead of a person's name.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}As such, I shall call you Ninja Hattori-san from now on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to go back to the dorm with Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}
